content.json:
# SpyCloud SOC Operations Dashboard
**Security Operations Center** - Real-time threat monitoring, active incident queue, and playbook execution tracking for SOC analysts.

> This workbook provides an operational view across SpyCloud data sources optimized for SOC workflows and incident response.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["New Exposures", 0, 1, "Critical Alerts", 0, 2, "Pending Remediations", 0, 3, "Playbook Runs", 0, 4, "Failed Actions", 0, 5]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="New Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical Alerts", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(let remediated = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct UserPrincipalName; SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity >= 20 | where email !in (remediated) | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Pending Remediations", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(union (Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}), (SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Playbook Runs", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(union (Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ActionStatus in ("Failed", "Error")), (SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ActionStatus in ("Failed", "Error")) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Failed Actions", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: SOC Operational Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Exposures=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Real-Time Exposure Ingestion (15-minute bins)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let remediated = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct UserPrincipalName;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| where email !in (remediated)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), InfectedDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend Priority = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "P1-CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "P2-HIGH", "P3-MEDIUM")
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| take 30
| project Priority, User=email, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, InfectedDevices, LatestExposure)
content.title: Active Incident Queue - Unresolved High-Severity Exposures

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), SeverityLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Exposure Ingestion by Severity (Hourly)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="MDE-Isolation", Target=DeviceName, Action=Action, Status=ActionStatus),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="CA-Remediation", Target=UserPrincipalName, Action=Action, Status=ActionStatus)
| extend StatusIndicator = case(Status in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed"), "SUCCESS", Status in ("Failed", "Error"), "FAILED", "PENDING")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
| project TimeGenerated, Playbook, Target, Action, StatusIndicator)
content.title: Recent Playbook Executions
